name: stackra/admin-console
purpose: Central-plane admin console module — AdminDashboardConfig per-user or per-tenant panel configuration for the platform_admin-guarded surface.
capabilities: Foundation for support + ops + engineering dashboards
Depends on platform-user for staff principals
when_to_use: Persisting admin-console layout and widget state for Stackra internal staff dashboards.
when_not_to_use: For tenant-audience admin surfaces (per-Tenant CRUD), the tenant-scoped module packages ship those directly.
